raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":1.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A review of this section centrally requires checking whether the diagnostic premises, numerical results, and conclusions form a coherent argument chain.","R1.3":"The section makes explicit claims from reported gradient norms and test errors, so verifying whether those claims are supported by the reported evidence is load-bearing.","R1.6":"A generic section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and wording issues as a central responsibility.","RX.1":"The reviewer should disclose uncertainty where the section lacks surrounding methodological or table context.","RX.2":"The section contains broad generalization and prescription language, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.","RX.3":"The task is to review this section only, so the projection must stay within the artifact and not perform broader paper or literature work.","RX.4":"Because the section recommends practitioner deployment behavior, the review should attend to downstream misuse or harmful recommendations from unsupported conclusions.","RX.5":"Any review judgments should be traceable to the specific reported diagnostics, errors, and claims in the provided artifact."}}

rationale.R1.2: A review of this section centrally requires checking whether the diagnostic premises, numerical results, and conclusions form a coherent argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes explicit claims from reported gradient norms and test errors, so verifying whether those claims are supported by the reported evidence is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.6: A generic section review normally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, register, and wording issues as a central responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: The reviewer should disclose uncertainty where the section lacks surrounding methodological or table context.
rationale.RX.2: The section contains broad generalization and prescription language, making overclaim avoidance load-bearing.
rationale.RX.3: The task is to review this section only, so the projection must stay within the artifact and not perform broader paper or literature work.
rationale.RX.4: Because the section recommends practitioner deployment behavior, the review should attend to downstream misuse or harmful recommendations from unsupported conclusions.
rationale.RX.5: Any review judgments should be traceable to the specific reported diagnostics, errors, and claims in the provided artifact.
